channel.title: JoySpace Status Feed
channel.description: Read-only JoySpace audit status feed. Authority remains false.

item.title: Seed Planter sample badge flow proved
item.description: JoySpace Validation #6 passed for the sample Seed Planter proof, witness, and award chain. Feeds are newly added and pending Pages proof. Authority remains false.

item.title: JoySpace documented stack proved through schema validation
item.description: Website, criteria, SVG assets, manifest, and schemas are proved for the current repo state. Production-scale operation remains unproved. Authority remains false.
